name: Priest
description: Focused on healing, support and holy magic.

name: Monk
description: Close combat fighter using faith and physical strength.

name: Guardian
description: High defense and party protection specialist.

name: Crusader
description: Balanced offense and defense with holy abilities.

name: Elementalist
description: Master of fire, ice and lightning magic.

name: Arcanist
description: Focused on raw magic power and spell amplification.

name: Assassin
description: High burst damage and stealth gameplay.

name: Ranger
description: Long range physical damage and precision.

name: Hunter
description: Traps, mobility and sustained ranged damage.

name: Necromancer
description: Summons undead creatures and curses enemies.

name: Berserker
description: High damage melee fighter with aggressive skills.
